DescribeDimensionValues.filters.op: Filter operator; options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeDimensionValues.filters.value: Single value, usable with operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeDimensionValues.filters.values: Multiple values, usable with operator: in
